required_fields.object_type: Disc, Vertebra, Implant, Spacer, FusionSegment, or AlignmentCorrection.
required_fields.geometry: Centroid, height, width/depth proxies, and local axes where available.
required_fields.relationships: Graph neighbors, above/below structures, or attached structures.
required_fields.measurements: Current measurement values derived from existing OrthoTwin state.
required_fields.constraints: Motion locks, target height, material placeholder, correction vector, and other deterministic constraints.

scope: Geometry-aware research representation only; no clinical validity claim.
